sections.heading: Circular No: ID 18/24
sections.title: MAS publishes AI model risk management information paper for insurers
sections.summary: The Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS) released an information paper outlining good practices for AI model risk management, specifically targeting licensed insurers and Lloyd's Asia Scheme members. The paper focuses on governance, oversight, risk management systems, and AI development/deployment practices observed during a thematic review of financial institutions' AI practices in mid-2024. MAS encourages financial institutions to adopt these practices when implementing AI systems.
sections.dtia_summary: This section provides guidance on AI model risk management practices relevant to financial institutions, which may impact data transfer considerations when deploying AI systems across borders.

requirements.text: MAS published an information paper on AI model risk management for licensed insurers and Lloyd's Asia Scheme
The information paper focuses on governance and oversight, key risk management systems, and AI development/deployment practices
MAS encourages financial institutions to reference these good practices when developing and deploying AI

sections.source_quote:
Circular No: ID 18/24
5 December 2024
To Chief Executives
All Licensed Insurers and Lloyd's Asia Scheme
